name: Salmon Steaks with Wine Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the salmon steaks in a single layer on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
2. Heat the vegetable oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add the butter and cornstarch to the skillet, stirring until combined.
4. Season the mixture with white pepper to taste.
5. Gently place the salmon steaks into the skillet, coating them evenly on both sides.
6. Transfer the baking sheet with the salmon to a preheated oven set at 400°F (200°C).
7. Bake for about 10-12 minutes or until the salmon is cooked through and easily flakes with a fork.
8. In a small bowl, combine the half & half cream, beaten egg yolk, and dry white wine.
9. Whisk until well combined.
10. Serve the warm salmon steaks topped with the sauce and garnish with seedless green grapes if desired.
